content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.trading.unified_trader
FILE: cosmos/integration/trading/unified_trader.py (391 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Unified Trading Interface.

Routes trades through Bankr first, with fallback to chain-specific implementations.

CLASSES:
- TradeStatus(Enum)
- TradeRequest: Unified trade request.
  Methods: def to_bankr_prompt(self) -> str
- TradeResponse: Unified trade response.
- UnifiedTrader: Unified trading interface across all chains.

Uses Bankr as the primary handler 
  Methods: async def execute(self, request: TradeRequest) -> TradeResponse
  Methods: async def buy(self, token: str, amount: float, chain: str='base', in_usd: bool=True) -> TradeRespons
  Methods: async def sell(self, token: str, amount: float, chain: str='base') -> TradeResponse
  Methods: async def swap(self, from_token: str, to_token: str, amount: float, chain: str='base') -> TradeRespo
  Methods: async def get_price(self, token: str) -> float
